name: Transistor (Bipolar and Field-Effect)
tagline: Solid-state charge control in semiconductors — amplification and logic without heated cathodes
problem:
Vacuum tubes scale poorly in power, size, and lifetime for portable and planetary-scale logic. A cold switch that modulates conductivity with a third terminal enables dense, reliable circuits if materials science can produce clean junctions and surface passivation.

The bipolar junction transistor uses emitter injection and base transport; the MOSFET uses an electric field through oxide to induce channel charge. Each family trades speed, voltage handling, and fabrication complexity.

Without surface passivation, silicon devices drift and leak; without photolithography at micron scale, integration stalls — but the transistor is the atomic actuator of the information age.
overview:
Planar silicon process grows thermal oxide, patterns windows photolithographically, diffuses or implants boron and phosphorus, metallises aluminium contacts, and passivates surfaces. Bipolar devices optimise beta and Early voltage; CMOS pairs nMOS and pMOS for static power near zero except during switching.

Packaging bonds wires from die pads to lead frames, moulds epoxy, and trims tested units. Failure modes include electromigration in narrow aluminium, hot-carrier injection in short channels, and latch-up in CMOS bulk.

Discrete power transistors parallel thousands of cells; IGBTs merge MOS gates with bipolar conductivity modulation for traction inverters.

Characterisation uses curve tracers, S-parameters, and reliability ovens — Arrhenius acceleration predicts decadelong wear in weeks.

principles.name: PN junction physics
principles.explanation: Diffusion and drift balance set built-in potential; bias modulates depletion width and injection currents exponentially with voltage in ideal diode law.

principles.name: Field effect in MOS
principles.explanation: Vertical field inverts surface from p to n (or inverse), forming conductive channel whose sheet resistance gate voltage modulates.

principles.name: Carrier mobility
principles.explanation: Electrons move faster than holes in silicon — nMOS tends faster in equal geometry; strain silicon boosts mobility in advanced nodes.

principles.name: Scaling constant-field
principles.explanation: Shrink dimensions while adjusting doping and oxide thickness to preserve internal fields — until quantum tunnelling ends Dennard scaling.

components.name: Emitter, base, collector regions
components.position: Implanted or diffused mesas then planar
components.madeFrom: Silicon with arsenic, phosphorus, boron profiles

components.name: Gate oxide and polysilicon gate
components.madeFrom: SiO₂ historically; high-k HfO₂ in advanced nodes

components.name: Silicide and metal contacts
components.madeFrom: TiSi₂ or CoSi₂ then copper dual damascene in fabs

components.name: Package and heatsink
components.madeFrom: TO-220 epoxy, Cu base plates in power modules

rawMaterials.name: Silicon wafers
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Import until local crystal pullers exist

rawMaterials.name: Photoresists and acids
rawMaterials.spaceAlternatives: Wet bench chemistry is import-heavy early

buildSteps.title: Simulate process TCAD
buildSteps.description: Predict junction depths, thresholds, and breakdown; iterate implant energies.
buildSteps.warningNote: Models without calibration to fab data mis-predict short-channel effects

buildSteps.title: Fabricate test structures
buildSteps.description: PCM dice with ring oscillators, Van der Pauw sheets, and chain FETs.
buildSteps.warningNote: Misaligned masks show as leaky junctions everywhere

buildSteps.title: Wire-bond and mould
buildSteps.description: Ultrasonic wedge bonds; transfer mould; trim/form leads.
buildSteps.warningNote: Epoxy outgassing can corrode bonds in hermetic failures

buildSteps.title: Burn-in screen
buildSteps.description: Accelerate infant mortality with voltage-temperature stress.
buildSteps.warningNote: Overstress destroys good parts if recipe wrong

buildSteps.title: Datasheet and SPICE model
buildSteps.description: Publish safe operating area curves; release compact models for circuit designers.
buildSteps.warningNote: Missing thermal derating invites field fires

history.event: Point-contact transistor demonstrated at Bell Labs.
Bipolar junction transistor theory by Shockley.
MOSFET commercialisation begins as planar oxide quality improves.

inventors.name: William Shockley
inventors.contribution: Junction transistor and semiconductor theory leadership

impact:
Transistors shrank radios to pockets and later put billions of switches on one die — the hinge between industrial electricity and planetary computation.

Understanding them is prerequisite to reading any modern datasheet.

videos.title: MOSFET operation
videos.description: Solid-state electronics courses on threshold, saturation, and body effect.
